programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: In an act of desperation, Jenny brings Zoe to visit a daunting figure from her past; Kate tries to revive her sex life and makes a pact with an amped-up Anne.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate spins a PR crisis using Nathan's recent guilty pleasure; Anne and Lionel grow suspicious of Alice's involvement in a club; Val helps Sloane find a community of her own.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Shannon gets caught between Travis and his past; Kristian seeks a promotion.

programme.title: Baroness von Sketch Show
programme.sub-title: No One Wants To Be That Lady
programme.desc: A superhero for our times; we're all dehydrated; going braless requires a sacrifice.

programme.title: CBC Winnipeg Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Comics discuss femininity and unrealistic expectations, double standards and mansplaining.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma believes she has discovered a murder weapon, as Janet realizes she and Nathan have nothing in common; at Handy, Kimchee struggles to fit in with the other regional managers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma's plans for the future push Appa out of his comfort zone; Janet gets an internship overseas, and Jung and Kimchee explore new living arrangements.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma's new parking pass gives Appa an idea; Janet searches for more meaningful work; Shannon's mixup leads to an awkward situation for the Handy staff.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: For the school's charity day, Gerry steps into the ring with Mr. Dwyer to decide the Mr. D title once and for all.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Under scrutiny from a board member, Gerry faces the challenge of showcasing his job prowess to avoid severe consequences; Robert becomes principal for a day.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry wants to buy a new car and finds a second job to make some extra cash for it; Robert cuts from Leung's library; Trudy finds out that Bobbi can't flirt.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: When Ritchie invites himself to a sleepover, Mark scrambles to hide his family's behavior; Mike Sr. takes a staunch pro-cucumber stance.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark fears he'll be outed as a Monarchist when he's chosen to give flowers to a visiting Lady Diana; a gift from Dick comes between Mike Sr. and Mary.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira receives some unexpected news, and David makes a tough decision about where he wants to live.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David stresses out over the rain on his wedding day, but his family makes it right.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.sub-title: Best Wishes, Warmest Regards: A Schitt's Creek Farewell
programme.desc: An intimate behind-the-scenes look at the adored series.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate spins a PR crisis using Nathan's recent guilty pleasure; Anne and Lionel grow suspicious of Alice's involvement in a club; Val helps Sloane find a community of her own.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate joins Ram out of office to brainstorm; Sloane catches her new friend in a lie; Jenny joins a surprising self-defense class; Anne resolves to foil Alice's plan.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: When they wake up at Kate's office the morning after a night no-one can remember, the ladies must piece together exactly how a celebration for Alice could have gone so horribly wrong.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Alice's party, Kate does her due diligence to make things right.

programme.desc: For the school's charity day, Gerry steps into the ring with Mr. Dwyer to decide the Mr. D title once and for all.
